formulas.name: fLedgerAccount
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Ledger_Account__c}) , IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__c})) , IF( ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Ledger_Account__c}) , IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Base_Product__c})) , {!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Base_Product__r.Ledger_Account__c} , null ) , {!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Ledger_Account__c} ) , null ) , {!$Record.Subscription25__Ledger_Account__c} )

formulas.name: fLedgerAccountEU
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Ledger_Account_EU__c}) , IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__c})) , IF( ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Ledger_Account_EU__c}) , IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Base_Product__c})) , {!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Base_Product__r.Ledger_Account_EU__c} , null ) , {!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Ledger_Account_EU__c} ) , null ) , {!$Record.Subscription25__Ledger_Account_EU__c} )

formulas.name: fLedgerAccountNonEU
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Ledger_Account_Non_EU__c}) , IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__c})) , IF( ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Ledger_Account_Non_EU__c}) , IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Base_Product__c})) , {!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Base_Product__r.Ledger_Account_Non_EU__c} , null ) , {!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Ledger_Account_Non_EU__c} ) , null ) , {!$Record.Subscription25__Ledger_Account_Non_EU__c} )

formulas.name: fVATRate
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__VATRate__c}) , IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__c})) , IF( ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.VAT_Rate__c}) , IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Base_Product__c})) , {!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Base_Product__r.VAT_Rate__c} , null ) , {!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.VAT_Rate__c} ) , null ) , {!$Record.Subscription25__VATRate__c} )

formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__VATRate_EU__c}) , IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__c})) , IF( ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.VAT_Rate_EU__c}) , IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Base_Product__c})) , {!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Base_Product__r.VAT_Rate_EU__c} , null ) , {!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.VAT_Rate_EU__c} ) , null ) , {!$Record.Subscription25__VATRate_EU__c} )

formulas.name: fVATRate_Exempt
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__VATRate_Exempt__c}) , IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__c})) , IF( ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.VAT_Rate_Exempt__c}) , IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Base_Product__c})) , {!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.Base_Product__r.VAT_Rate_Exempt__c} , null ) , {!$Record.Subscription25__Product__r.VAT_Rate_Exempt__c} ) , null ) , {!$Record.Subscription25__VATRate_Exempt__c} )
